text.title: Client Handover Package Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "engagement ending" to "handover archived + final invoice unblocked".

step.name: draft
step.input: scope record, CI configs, runbook fragments, open-items tracker.
step.action: Fill the 7 sections in `handover-package.md` skeleton. Pull architecture diagram from `docs/`; condense ops surface from monitoring dashboards.

step.name: transfer-secrets
step.action: For each credential: rotate (regenerate key, update vault). Add row to credentials[] with rotation_date. Email successor with vault paths; capture their acknowledgement by reply.
step.decision-gate: Any credential missing acknowledged_by → STOP, verdict block-secrets-not-transferred.

step.name: review-with-successor
step.action: Live walkthrough (60–90 min): runbook execution, alert dashboards, open items review. Capture changes in real time.
step.decision-gate: Successor cannot execute the runbook unaided → STOP, expand runbook.

step.name: dual-signoff
step.action: Sign personally; email handover to client contact requesting signature. Capture both signed_by + signed_at.
step.decision-gate: Client side does not sign within 7 days → escalate to sponsor.

step.name: archive
step.action: Validate against schema. Commit to repo `docs/handover-<YYYY-MM>.json` (or shared drive). Send final invoice. Calendar reminder at day-30 to close support window.
